description_long: This is a modern, three-seater couch with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light gray textured fabric. The seat features three separate, thick cushions, while the backrest is divided into three matching, plush cushions for comfort. Two accent pillows with geometric zigzag patterns in blue, yellow, and white add a pop of color and visual interest to the otherwise neutral palette. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and fully upholstered, with additional rectangular side cushions for extra comfort. The couch sits on slim, exposed black metal legs that elevate it above the ground, giving it a light and airy appearance. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the upholstery, with foam or fiber filling for the cushions.
description: A modern, light gray three-seater couch with geometric accent pillows, straight upholstered armrests, and slim black metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, two colorful accent pillows, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight armrest, cushion thickness, and the profile of the accent pillow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous upholstered back and the tops of the accent pillows peeking over the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the straight armrest, cushion depth, and the arrangement of the accent pillow.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose seat cushions and three loose back cushions, with two accent pillows placed at each end and rectangular side cushions against the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light gray fabric with a subtle, irregular woven texture; accent pillows feature bold zigzag geometric patterns in blue, yellow, and white.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, slim, straight black metal legs of medium height, with a simple and modern design.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, medium-height, fully upholstered armrests with additional rectangular side cushions for comfort.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, divided backrest with three loose, plush cushions matching the seat cushions.
